## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature clearly.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you considered.

## Platform

- [ ] Windows
- [ ] Linux
- [ ] Both

## Safety impact

Does this touch Docker, host commands, validation, or file system access?

- [ ] No host/lab execution changes
- [ ] Lab/Docker changes (must follow [security-model.md](../../docs/security-model.md))
- [ ] Unsure — happy to discuss

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or references optional.
